texto: Yes, it is worse than thrown away, because every fair minded man must admit that the expenditure of this sum of money in the county for intoxicating liquor creates lawlessness, makes criminals, wrecks homes and brings trouble to innocent women and children.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Thomas Jordan Jarvis sobre temas ligados a familia. A afirmação “Yes, it is worse than thrown away, because every fair minded man must admit that the expenditure …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a familia, children, money, útil em momentos de termino e money.
